audit_items.proof_trace: All allocations in slowlogFreeEntry are freed in strict dependency order: per-argv decrRefCount loop completes before zfree(se->argv), then peerid/cname freed while se is still valid, then zfree(se) last — no pointer is accessed after its free. slowlogFreeEntry is only invoked once per node via listDelNode (which unlinks the node first), preventing double-free. Shared-refcount argv objects are stored without incrRefCount but decrRefCount is a no-op for them, and they are permanently alive; Redis's single-threaded event loop prevents concurrent modification of the slowlog during SLOWLOG GET iteration.
